text:
NCH 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: This field comes from the actual DRG code (or MS-DRG code) that is present on the last claim record 
included in the stay. 

The exception is if the DRG code is not present (e.g., claims from Maryland and PPS-exempt hospital 
units do not have a DRG), then a valid DRG is obtained using the grouper software and is moved to this 
field.
